name: La Signora, The Eighth of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers
description:
With the Anemo and Geo Gnosis delivered to the Tsaritsa, Signora is now at some steps away from entering into the Tenshukaku to request the Electro Gnosis from Ei. She's very motivated with her recent succesful missions, but... maybe she will find an obstacle in her way? or... maybe a little help? You decides, you can be through the messages or the chat memory the Traveller... Yae Miko... a random patrolman... another Fatui Harbinger like... Columbina? Scaramouche? well is clear, isn't it? Through the first message you can experience with your own character to see what happens with the destiny of Signora, hum?

Image of this Genshin Impact bot created by じや : https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/90940211


Someone believes in her resurrection? 🤔
I can't deny that for a 'beginning of resurrections' and not to waste potential from the Fatui Harbingers I'd really like if Hoyoverse bring her out, anyway, with Arlecchino, Il Capitano and Columbina I'd be more than happy xD

Next bots:

- KOS-MOS (Xenoblade Chronicles and Xenosaga, the second game I haven't played it :c)
- Maybe finally Yunli... or... Feixiao (I got her :D) (Honkai Star Rail)

PS: This will probably be the last bot I post before my vacation over, so I'll probably be starting to have less time to be doing a bot a week, so... sorry if I delay more of the normal (or if I don't read one of your comments) 🙏
creator: Kikicris
